zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Ursulla Collingridge於大約1418年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾堂爾時，她的父親Bartholomew Collingridge36歲，母親Alice de Arundel32歲。她於大約1437年與Geoffrey Dormer IV在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1513年在英國享年97歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Ursulla Collingridge于大约1418年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾堂爾时，她的父亲Bartholomew Collingridge36岁，母亲Alice de Arundel32岁。她于大约1437年与Geoffrey Dormer IV在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1513年在英国享年97岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Collingridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name perhaps from Cowan Bridge in Lancs, recorded as Collingbrigke in about 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Ursulla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Ursula, a diminutive of ursa ‘(she-)bear’. This was the name of a 4th-century saint martyred at Cologne with a number of companions, traditionally said to have been eleven thousand, but more probably just eleven, the exaggeration being due to a misreading of a diacritic mark in an early manuscript. This name was moderately popular in the 16th century, but its use in the English-speaking world today is selective. A more recent influence has been the film actress Ursula Andress ( b. 1936 in Switzerland).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Ursulla Collingridge was born about 1418, in Towersey, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Bartholomew Collingridge, was 36 and her mother, Alice de Arundel, was 32. She married Geoffrey Dormer IV about 1437, in West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1513, in England, at the age of 97, and was buried in Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Ursulla Collingridge est née environ 1418, à Towersey, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bartholomew Collingridge, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice de Arundel, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffrey Dormer IV environ 1437, à West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1513, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 97 ans, et a été enterrée à Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England,: West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Ursulla Collingridge um 1418 in Towersey, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bartholomew Collingridge 36 und ihre Mutter Alice de Arundel 32. Sie hat um 1437 in West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Geoffrey Dormer IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1513 im Alter von 97 Jahren in England und wurde in Oxfordshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Geoffrey Dormer IV circa 1437, nel West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Alice Ursulla Collingridgeが約1418年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウエルセイで生まれた時，父Bartholomew Collingridgeは36歳，母Alice de Arundelは32歳であった。約1437年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエスト ウイコンベでGeoffrey Dormer IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1513年にイギリスで97歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Ursulla Collingridge(이)가 대략 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 타워시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholomew Collingridge(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Arundel(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1437년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 웨스트 윈이코브에서 Geoffrey Dormer IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1513년 영국에서 97세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Ursulla Collingridge nasceu aproximadamente 1418, em Towersey, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Bartholomew Collingridge, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Arundel, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffrey Dormer IV aproximadamente 1437, em West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1513, em Inglaterra, com 97 anos, e foi sepultada em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Ursulla Collingridge родилась около 1418 г. в местности тоуэрси, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Bartholomew Collingridge было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Arundel, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffrey Dormer IV около 1437 г. в местности вест викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1513 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 97 лет и была похоронена в местности оксфордшир, Англия.
